# Fixture Agent Instructions

This is a deterministic KRN target-repo fixture.

Use it only to prove target repo init/connect/plan behavior. Do not treat it as
external operator proof.

Trusted source roots:

- `src/`
- `tests/`
- `docs/`

Untrusted or generated paths:

- `.env*`
- `.muke/`
- `.supersearch/runtime/`
- `dist/`
- `build/`
